title: ClanForge
description: Complete clan ecosystem with storage, economy, rankings and cross-server synchronization
body:
Take your server to the next level with an advanced clan system! This plugin provides a fully customizable experience with an intuitive GUI, perks, leaderboards, and more. ✨ Features: ✅ Admin Management
✅ User-friendly GUI – Manage clans easily through an interactive menu
✅ Custom Clan Tags & Colors – Stand out with unique tag colors
✅ Clan Bases – Set up multiple bases and teleport to them
✅ Perks System – Unlock special perks for your clan
✅ Economy Support – Requires coins to create clans and perform actions
✅ Leaderboards – Compete for the top clan ranking
✅ Custom Messages & Localization – Fully translatable messages
✅ Vault & Economy Integration – Supports any Vault-compatible economy
✅ PlaceholderAPI Support
✅ Hex Color Support
✅ MySQL Support
✅ BungeeCord Support
✅ Clan Wars
✅ Discord Bot Integration Required Plugins:
Vault, Economy Plugin, ProtocolLib, PlaceholderAPI
PlaceholderAPI %clans_clan_name% - Clan name (with color)
%clans_clan_tag% - Clan tag (with color)
%clans_clan_name_orig% - Clan name (without color)
%clans_clan_tag_orig% - Clan tag (without color)
%clans_clan_leader% - Сlan Leader
%clans_clan_members% - Сlan Members
%clans_clan_level% - Сlan level
%clans_clan_coins% - Сlan coins
%clans_clan_xp% - Сlan XP
%clans_clan_kills% - Сlan Kills
%clans_clan_deaths% - Сlan Deaths
%clans_clan_kdr% - Сlan KDR
%clans_top_level_% - Top clan by level
%clans_top_coins_% - Top clan by coins
%clans_top_kills_% - Top clan by kills
%clans_top_kdr_% - Top clan by KD

Commands and Permissions
Command Description Permission
/clan createCreate a new clanclans.create
/clan join Join a clan by name or tagclans.join
/clan menuFor the leader: opens the upgrade menuclans.menu
/clan listList of all clans on the serverclans.list
/clan topOpen the top clans menuclans.top
/clan leaveLeave your current clanclans.leave
/clan membersList of players in your clanclans.members
/clan member View the clan member infoclans.member.info
/clan disbandDisband your clanclans.disband
/clan invite [player]Invite a player to your clanclans.invite
/clan acceptAccept a clan invitationclans.accept
/clan denyDeny a clan invitationclans.deny
/clan kick [player]Kick a player from your clanclans.kick
/clan promote [player]Promote a player to officerclans.promote
/clan demote [player]Demote an officer to memberclans.demote
/clan transfer [player]Transfer clan leadershipclans.transfer
/clan storageOpen the clan storageclans.storage
/clan pvpClan PvP: ON/OFFclans.pvp.toggle
/clan permission [player] [perm] [true/false]Set Custom Permissions for playerclans.permission
/cc [msg]Clan chatclans.chat
/clan setbase [name]Set a clan baseclans.base.create
/clan base tp [name]Teleport to a clan baseclans.base.tp
/clan base delete [name]Delete a clan baseclans.base.delete
/clan deposit [amount]Deposit money into clan bankclans.deposit
/clan withdraw [amount]Withdraw coins from the clan balanceclans.withdraw
/clan tag [tag/reset]Set clan tagclans.tag
/clan rename [name]Rename your clanclans.rename
/clan publicSet the clan Publicclans.type.public
/clan privateSet the clan Privateclans.type.private
/clan motd add [text]Add a line to clan MOTDclans.motd.add
/clan motd edit [line] [text]Edit a MOTD lineclans.motd.edit
/clan motd remove [line]Remove a MOTD lineclans.motd.remove
/clan motd clearClear the clan MOTDclans.motd.clear
/clan motd previewPreview the clan MOTDclans.motd.preview
/clan helpShow helpclans.use
/clan admin info [clan]View detailed clan informationclans.admin.info
/clan admin storage [clan]Open clan storageclans.admin.storage
/clan admin delete [clan]Delete a clanclans.admin.delete
/clan admin rename [clan] [new_name]Rename a clanclans.admin.rename
/clan admin tag [clan] [tag/reset]Set clan tag or resetclans.admin.tag
/clan admin setlevel [clan] [level]Set clan levelclans.admin.setlevel
/clan admin coins add [clan] [amount]Add coins to clan balanceclans.admin.coins.add
/clan admin coins set [clan] [amount]Set clan coinsclans.admin.coins.set
/clan admin coins take [clan] [amount]Take coins from clanclans.admin.coins.take
/clan admin xp add [clan] [amount]Add clan XPclans.admin.xp.add
/clan admin xp take [clan] [amount]Take XP from clanclans.admin.xp.take
/clan admin base list [clan]List all clan basesclans.admin.base.list
/clan admin base tp [clan] [base]Teleport to clan baseclans.admin.base.tp
/clan admin base delete [clan] [base]Delete clan baseclans.admin.base.delete
/clan admin syncSync clans dataclans.admin.sync
/clan admin helpShow helpclans.admin
/clan reloadReload plugin configurationclans.admin.reload
-All admin permissionsclans.admin.*
CW Commands and Permission
Command Description Permission
/clan warOpen the Clan Warclans.war.menu
/clan war challenge [max_players] [kit]Challenge a clan to warclans.war.challenge
/clan war acceptAccept a pending war challengeclans.war.accept
/clan war denyDeny a pending war challengeclans.war.deny
/clan war joinJoin an active war for your clanclans.war.join
/clan war historyView your clan war historyclans.war.history
/clan war watch Watch an active warclans.war.watch
/clanwar or /cwCW Admin Commandclans.war.admin
